items.title: In the 2025-26 season the Boston Celtics were +15.8 in Net rating with Max Shulga on the floor and Jaylen Brown off vs just +6.7 with Brown on and Shulga off. That is a Net rating of +9.1 with Shulga instead of JB. Did they make a mistake by not giving all of JB's minutes to Max Shulga?
items.author: SoKrat3s
items.body_excerpt: With Shulga w/o JB = +15.8 With JB w/o Shulga = +6.7 Difference +9.1 NET with Shulga and without JB.

items.title: Boston Celtics cap situation after declining Amari Williams and Max Shulga. Both can be brought back on two-ways.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Boston Celtics cap situation after declining Amari Williams and Max Shulga. Both can be brought back on two-ways.

Dalano Banton remains on a non-guaranteed salary.

Neemias Queta and Jordan Walsh become extension-eligible starting on July 6.

items.title: The Boston Celtics did not tender qualifying offers to Max Shulga or John Tonje, a league source told @spotrac.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Boston Celtics did not tender qualifying offers to Max Shulga or John Tonje, a league source told @spotrac.

Both Shulga and Tonje will be unrestricted free agents this offseason.
